summary: The diff modifies backend/main.mo and frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx. REQ-3 (frontend warning banner with Reload button) is clearly implemented in AdminPanel.tsx. REQ-2 (backend audit of getAllMembers to preserve stable member data) has partial evidence in backend/main.mo but the truncation prevents full verification of postupgrade/initialization logic fixes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit getAllMembers to ensure stable member data is preserved across upgrades; fix any initialization or postupgrade logic that clears or resets the members stable data structure.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the getAllMembers function, postupgrade hooks, or any stable variable declarations for members. There is no visible evidence that initialization logic was audited or fixed to prevent clearing stable member data.
